---
title: "My First Half-Marathon"
date: 2010-12-02
author: Jonathan Whitmore
draft: true
categories: []
---

[![Zabriskie Point at sunrise in Death Valley](http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/25/Zabriskie_Point_at_sunrise_in_Death_Valley_NP.JPG/300px-Zabriskie_Point_at_sunrise_in_Death_Valley_NP.JPG)](http://commons.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Zabriskie_Point_at_sunrise_in_Death_Valley_NP.JPG) Image via [Wikipedia](http://commons.wikipedia.org/wiki/File:Zabriskie_Point_at_sunrise_in_Death_Valley_NP.JPG) 

I signed up for the [Death Valley Borax Half Marathon](http://www.envirosports.com/events/death-valley-borax-marathon-half-marathon-10k) this week. It sounds bad-ass to run in Death Valley, but the race takes place in February (9 weeks from now), so it won't be hot. If you want to join me feel free to register for it [here](https://cui2.active.com/event-reg/select-race?e=6013e449-7d88-7668-911c-30a02744165f).

I've been running with my new [Garmin Forerunner 305](http://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B000CSWCQA?ie=UTF8&tag=religdebat-20&linkCode=as2&camp=1789&creative=390957&creativeASIN=B000CSWCQA) -- and I love it. It had crazy-good reviews on the Amazon page, and so I went ahead with it. Interestingly, the 305 had better reviews than the 405 -- apparently they went with a touchscreen on the newer model that doesn't work as well as the buttons of the older model.
